Thanks Patrick and Craig!

Would definitely recommend to friends and family 100% and I will only be using them for future home purchases 👌","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robert Coleman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKtCTcnH6KvMTPRp8Z7NO2jap8FQwKAAvggJVwKEEINIpVY-w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This guy is a  fraud ....He did the roof on my house and it leaked on the first time it rained. [{"Name":"Holly Kelly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKEnEzWQXt8Ot3WTwnfqjN3vl4gcGYctcYbmNX5_JrawK6rpw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very impressed with our experience with Niagara Roof Masters, from our consultation to then working with the team lead Ryan and his team, everyone was so professional. Our roof was completed in one day as they advised. The team completing the job were very friendly and mindful of my children coming in and out the house and my dogs in the backyard. Clean up was thorough. We received quote from a few companies in the area and were very pleased with the warranty and financing options that no other company could offer. Ryan specifically went above and beyond to ensure we were happy. Communication was very clear on all aspects. I can not  recommend Niagara Roof Masters enough, very pleased with the service provided.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELbVqJ6o9t6GvAE&fid=0x0:0xc10222b33fe53aa"],"When":"2025-5-15"},{"Name":"Anna Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQSCHjBWwX4btIo3Y5QIpmcu7WnCKEytDPcos7Du-vi-3YuDU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Well l had a surprising leak downstairs just before l was planning to go away, David came to the rescue, he explained the issue and took care of the problem, now l have peace of mind and l am happy to go on my vacation. Thank you so much David for rushing over and help a widow like myself. God bless Niagara Roofmasters for everything. They are amazing l have full confidence in them doing the work efficiently and good bye leak. Hallelujah!!!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDMUtO7HNwOcVJHBjay8MJt&fid=0x0:0xc10222b33fe53aa"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"Carolyn Odell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWx14iDepzfhHYtBlZodTyHQY59gN-VXGM1yy-doi8ElnkTdg8W=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After several quotes on repairs and reshingling my roof, I  stopped  looking when Roofmasters came. Not only professional yet friendly, Derek went up in both attic spaces and showed me pictures  of a concerning issue, while other companies  just walked around the roof. He was thorough, informative and patiently explained things without being pushy. Ryan came in throughout  to check on progress and completion, putting me at ease. Pricing was explained and more than fair as many sheets of plywood needed replacing. Communication is key with this company.  When they say they will be there, they are. Weather permitting,  they show up, from daily work, bin removal, flashing completion, to final check up when complete.
I can't  say enough about Kevin and his crew. Kevin was amazing, going above and beyond. His knowledge, skill and great work ethic saw the big job done beautifully and I  am thrilled. The crew efficiently cleaned up as they worked, as well as the end of each day
I can now relax and not worry the next time a wind storm  blows through !
Thank you to the Team at Roofmaster!             I highly recommend  you to everyone!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD21Gz1AiZ5ZhFZUSA3ex3X&fid=0x0:0xc10222b33fe53aa"],"When":"2025-9-16"},{"Name":"spruce","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKmFl_YZw9kw4_vjjP5jFXJoXY11R1miSEJd2dzOFeSjocuDw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Reply: The debris has already been cleaned up, but your offer is appreciated. Just wanted to make people aware to avoid this in the future.

This is about the company's negligence towards others' safety, respect for others' property, and work clean up. A neighbour hired this company to do their roof. As these pictures show, on my property, we found;
- random loose nails,
- roofing tile pieces,
- a roofing tile with 2 nails sticking up,
- a row of 10 brad nails that we almost wouldn't have found, or could've stepped on if they didn't shine in the light
- a piece of clear plastic wrap
- it appears that a worker stuffed Timberline packaging under my fence where there's a small opening

A large part of this disregard for others' safety and property was when a worker from this company was up on the neighbour's roof, blowing the garbage/debris away with a leaf blower, which fell onto my property.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAM1-eNftP_nWDbgLaFWUcW&fid=0x0:0xc10222b33fe53aa"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Neal Cockshutt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKU_7fNQrxU7r41yv8KHwSusWfJeI9fuVL6ziqu7ur8TZy-Qw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Terrible to deal with. Months late starting job. Left garbage in my yard for weeks and weeks. Several months later they have not finished and are demanding full payment. He did an excellent job and explained various options in full to me. I will definitely be recommending his services to others and will be using this again in the near future. Thank you for everything!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Linda Gutri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWbRnfJAv4DjyrwEkN0VuNKD4CPnzWPafr8Zo5sqCEDm2Q7G5_s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"When the Niagara Roof Masters salesman was gone and for the rest of the day, I was cursing myself for being an easy sell. I was told by a house inspector my roof renewal would cost $6,000 at today's prices. The final bill with Niagara Roof Masters was to be more than double what I was expecting. I had found roofers who would do my job for $4,600. But the Niagara Roof Masters salesman took my adult son on the roof and my son saw rotten wood under the shingles plus what looked like 2x4s holding the shingles. It's no wonder shingles had been blown away by wind and there were patches of fixes all over the place. Niagara tore all that out and put on plywood and a breathable underlayment to prevent rot from moisture. Plus they put on peel & stick underlayment for asphalt shingles all around the edges about a metre wide. The warranty for my roof is 25  years now. After all is said & done, I'm pleased beyond words. Had only the shingles been done I would have lost patches to the wind. I did read all of the one-star reviews for Niagara Roof Masters and the only thing that stood out was a complaint they didn't clean up properly afterwards. However, my crew did clean up -- thoroughly -- so I have no complaints. These guys worked hard, behaved professionally and as a result I had confidence in what they were doing. Kudos to The Home Depot who put me in touch with these guys. The Depot has a nifty service whereby you tell them your house issues and they find and contact 3 pros for solutions who are then in charge of calling you -- you don't call them. The advantage with this system is a business is vetted by The Home Depot and they encourage you to ask the business questions to vet them yourself. With the strong winds we have been getting I'm so glad my roof is done and done properly. Shout-out to Dan Bree, the Senior Home Advisor who probably saved me from getting a lot of patchwork in future years had I not learned a bit about roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dawn Riesebosch","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLH9JkonPJc-xLZhkg8DBEcoxw6d99Wwuzmq6w9YUyAHlXQbg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Craig's presentation quote is very impressive and comprehensive with detail photos and explanations. Great jobs guys! Very polite and professional.
Great example of employees.
Very pleased .Thankyou!😊","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Max Jordan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVi39cRQQA-sRlr_wouwIKh1DK1NWncgZON1fq-RhGZ6388BY8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Due to my delightful experiences with this company, I highly recommend them.
Many years back, I was looking for a reputable roofing company in case I needed one. One day I spotted a gentleman who was working meticulously with utmost attention to details on the roof of a house near mine, whose professionalism caught my attention, and right then and there I knew I had the right company, so I memorized the company’s name - Hamblet’s Roofing.
A few months later, due to strong winds, I needed some repairs done on my roof. I called them, and a courteous gentleman with a pleasant demeanour, John, showed up in a timely fashion. John has worked on my house several times since then - mostly for emergency repairs; he is understanding and perceptive about your needs and situation.

Pros: Competitive price savings, 1-day job, safe and tidy job site.

Cons: Scuffed siding here and there (minor),  satellite dish 'removal' (minor because addressed by owner)

In Feb 2018 I asked JPG Construction to estimate the cost of re-roofing my house.  Jean Phillip (JP) came over the same day,  on time, and made a great impression for JPG Construction. Jean Phillip is not impatient or aggressive.  He listens to questions and answers them thoughtfully. He made helpful suggestions. Of course, I agreed to his estimate. :)

April 10 2018  Jean Phillip was on site to greet me and to see the job started. The shingle delivery was right on time.  Jean Phillips' brother was lead man of the crew.  The crew came to work exactly on time and started the job with energy and enthusiasm.  My roof was covered with workers by 8:10. The crew was mindful of safety for themselves, my family and mindful of our pets.  The job was finished in 8 hours as JP said it would be. The yard was clean.  There are some minor scuffs in the siding, I think you cannot them see from the street.  A satellite dish was thrown out in error,  I only asked to have it removed.  Jean Phillip is taking care of that for me.

My experience was very positive and I will have more work for this company in the future.  Do yourself a favor and hire this company before they are too busy!

Thank you JPG for a great job!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDEt7aCXA&fid=0x0:0x9b8af7c926549798"],"When":"2018-4-12"},{"Name":"Karl Regier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlUfc9zVrJ6v3UNzRLrh1MFCbxTB3Hkk5RlgmO80dPhawh6w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"JPG did and amazing job and were in and out in a day when my tenant was away, the tenants came back and said "The new roof looks great and the crew did a hell of a clean-up job. Pro.Found went above and beyond their original scope of work. The owner returned to personally repair the original vents with screws and caulking. He also installed a water diverter at the base of one of the eavestroughs to reduce the high water flow rate which led to extensive ice build up during winter months.

Pro.Found’s quote was highly competitive even after the additional work. It was less than we had budgeted.

In summary, Pro.Found Roofing is professional with meticulous attention to detail using quality products at a competitive price installed in a timely manner. They left our property clean and devoid of any roofing waste.
